title: Eating Hot Pot 火锅店
scene: Mike和Tom在火锅店点锅底和食材。

lines.en: I am so hungry. Let us eat hot pot today!
lines.zh: 我好饿。我们今天吃火锅吧！

lines.en: Great idea! What soup base do you want?
lines.zh: 好主意！你想要什么锅底？

lines.en: I want spicy soup. Do you like spicy food?
lines.zh: 我要辣锅。你喜欢吃辣吗？

lines.en: Not really. Can we get half and half?
lines.zh: 不太能吃。我们可以点半半锅吗？

lines.en: Sure! Half spicy and half mushroom soup.
lines.zh: 当然！一半辣锅一半菌汤锅。

lines.en: Let us get some beef, fish balls, and vegetables.
lines.zh: 我们点些牛肉、鱼丸和蔬菜吧。

lines.en: I also want some noodles and tofu.
lines.zh: 我还想要些面条和豆腐。

lines.en: OK. This is going to be a great meal!
lines.zh: 好的。这顿饭一定会很棒！

lines.en: I cannot wait to start eating!
lines.zh: 我迫不及待想开始吃了！
